name: @quoin/pattern-disclosure
description: Disclosure pattern. A button that toggles the visibility of an associated content region. Foundational expand/collapse anatomy used by accordions, FAQs, settings panels, expand-for-detail surfaces. Translation from W3C ARIA Authoring Practices Guide. Phase 22.7.

source.translationFraming: transitional — to be retired in favor of native specification publication if ARIA APG publishes Quoin IR for this pattern
